evals.prompt: Give me a 5-question mixed-format quiz on Agile Testing with explanations.
evals.expected_output: A text file saved to the default output directory with 5 questions mixing single_choice, multi_select, and true_false formats. Each question includes answer and explanation.

evals.prompt: Create a short true/false quiz (3 questions) on Manual Testing.
evals.expected_output: 3 true_false questions about Manual Testing, saved as a text file.

evals.prompt: I need a JSON-formatted quiz on Automation Testing, 4 questions, easy level.
evals.expected_output: JSON object with up to 4 easy questions on Automation Testing.

evals.prompt: Quiz me on software development processes, hard difficulty, 2 short answer questions.
evals.expected_output: 2 hard short-answer questions about Software Development Processes.

evals.prompt: Test my knowledge of software quality with a mixed difficulty quiz.
evals.expected_output: 5-question quiz on Software Quality (default: mixed formats: single_choice, multi_select, true_false).

evals.prompt: I'm preparing for a QA interview, give me some practice questions.
evals.expected_output: A quiz covering software quality or testing topics (likely Agile QA + related), 5 questions default, mixed formats.

evals.prompt: Generate 6 questions on Security Testing with all three format types.
evals.expected_output: 6 questions on Security Testing, distributed across single_choice, multi_select, and true_false; saved as a text file.

evals.prompt: Give me a Performance Testing quiz — 5 mixed-format questions.
evals.expected_output: 5 mixed-format (single_choice, multi_select, true_false) questions on Performance Testing, saved as a text file.

evals.prompt: Quiz me on API Testing basics.
evals.expected_output: 5 questions on API Testing with mixed formats, saved as a text file in the default output directory.

evals.prompt: I want to learn about DevOps & CI/CD — give me a quiz.
evals.expected_output: 5 mixed-format questions on DevOps & CI/CD, saved as a text file.

evals.prompt: Create a multi-select only quiz on Emerging Technologies, 4 questions.
evals.expected_output: 4 multi_select questions on Emerging Technologies, saved as a text file.

evals.prompt: Generate a quiz on Agile QA, mixed difficulty, with explanations.
evals.expected_output: 5 mixed-format questions on Agile QA, with explanations, saved as a text file.
